pi_items.source: Synthetic task data - lot number created for test purposes, no authoritative source to verify
CDC/FindACode CVX database - CVX code 150 is defined as 'Influenza, injectable, quadrivalent, preservative free'
Synthetic task data - expiration date created for test purposes, no real vaccine record to verify against
Synthetic task data - quantity created for test purposes, no real vaccine inventory record to verify against
GlaxoSmithKline corporate website and FDA Vaccines database - GSK manufactures quadrivalent influenza vaccines including Fluarix Quadrivalent and Flulaval Quadrivalent

privileged_info_summary: The task involves adding a synthetic vaccine inventory record. Two key facts are verified: CVX code 150 is correctly identified as the standard code for Influenza, injectable, quadrivalent vaccine, and GlaxoSmithKline (GSK) is verified as a legitimate manufacturer of quadrivalent influenza vaccines, specifically Fluarix and Flulaval products. The specific lot number (FL-2026-QA), expiration date (2026-12-31), and quantity (50) are synthetic values created for the task simulation and cannot be verified against real-world sources.
